name: Nora Lynch

behaviour_pool: Deeply comfortable in her own space; home is a sanctuary, not a default.
Selective socialiser who invests deeply in a small circle rather than networking widely.
Recharges alone; needs downtime after social events even with people she loves.
Expert at domestic pleasures — her apartment smells good, her playlist is always right.
Quiet online but thoughtful; her messages are considered, never reactive.
Finds novelty in depth rather than breadth — can watch the same film ten times if it rewards it.
Stable and consistent; provides steady, reliable energy that people orbit for reassurance.
Creative in private — her inner life is richer than it appears from the outside.
Slow to open up but deeply loyal once she does; trust is the threshold, not time.
communication_style_pool: measured and deliberate, quality over quantity
warm in writing, slightly more cautious in person until comfortable
thoughtful listener who gives full attention
indirect on her own feelings but perceptive about others'
humorous in a dry, understated way
text-native — expresses herself best in writing
calm and non-reactive, rarely raises her voice
honest with people she trusts; polite but closed with everyone else
deep-diver in conversation; hates surface-level exchanges
relationship_goals_pool: a relationship that feels like home — safe, warm, unhurried
a partner who respects her need for quiet and has their own inner life
deep intimacy built slowly and maintained with intention
someone who would rather stay in and cook than go out
a partner who reads, thinks, and enjoys stillness with her
a steady, secure relationship — no drama, no guessing games
someone who cherishes the small domestic rituals as much as she does
a partner who is her favourite company in an ordinary Tuesday
a relationship that grows slowly and lasts long

behaviour: Expert at domestic pleasures — her apartment smells good, her playlist is always right.
communication_style: indirect on her own feelings but perceptive about others'
relationship_goals: someone who would rather stay in and cook than go out
background: Reference librarian in Boston. Knows where everything is and how to find what you didn't know you needed. Fiercely protective of quiet.
